grantsgov 0.0.0.9000

Package index

All functions

grant_api_key()
Read the Grants.gov API key from the environment
grant_base_url()
Simpler Grants.gov API base URL
grant_common_grants_get_opportunity()
Retrieve CommonGrants opportunity details
grant_common_grants_list_opportunities()
List CommonGrants opportunities
grant_common_grants_search_opportunities()
Search CommonGrants opportunities
grant_create_organization_invitation()
Create an organization invitation
grant_delete_organization_saved_opportunity()
Delete an organization saved opportunity
grant_download_extract()
Download an extract file
grant_endpoints()
List endpoints and documented option values
grant_extract_options()
List extract endpoint options
grant_fetch_all()
Fetch all records from a first-page response
grant_filter_date_range()
Build a date range filter
grant_filter_number_range()
Build a numeric range filter
grant_filter_one_of()
Build a one_of filter
grant_get_opportunity()
Retrieve opportunity details
grant_get_opportunity_legacy()
Retrieve opportunity details by legacy opportunity ID
grant_get_organization()
Get organization information
grant_health()
Check API health
grant_ignore_organization_legacy_user()
Ignore a legacy user for an organization
grant_list_all_extracts()
Paginate through all extract metadata
grant_list_extracts()
List extract metadata
grant_list_organization_invitations()
List organization invitations
grant_list_organization_legacy_users()
List organization legacy users
grant_list_organization_roles()
List organization roles
grant_list_organization_users()
List organization users
grant_paginate()
Paginate through an endpoint
grant_pagination()
Build a pagination specification
grant_rate_limit_headers()
List rate-limit response headers checked by the package
grant_read_extract()
Download and read a CSV extract
grant_recent_opportunities()
Get recently posted opportunities
grant_remove_organization_user()
Remove a user from an organization
grant_save_organization_opportunity()
Save an opportunity for an organization
grant_search_agencies()
Search agencies
grant_search_all_opportunities()
Paginate through opportunity search results
grant_search_opportunities()
Search grant opportunities
grant_search_options()
List opportunity search options
grant_sort()
Build a sort specification
grant_update_organization_user_roles()
Update roles for an organization user

Developed by John Muschelli.
